span.p:
计算原始贡献分 S_i
0.35×Git + 0.20×日志
+ 0.25×问答+自测 + 0.20×加分

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
贝叶斯平滑
r_i = S_i + C×prior / S_max + C
prior = 1/n, C = 50

span.p:
最终成绩
Score = Score_group × r_i + Bonus
